title: Senior Teacher - IL&FS Skills - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IL&FS Skills - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the IL&FS Skills family as a Senior Teacher in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IL&FS Skills:
IL&FS Skills is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills!
